items.author: @wandb
items.text:
To test an AI agent, you run it in a sandbox: a throwaway cloud machine where it does the real work.
Harbor, the framework most top labs use to run those tests, just added CoreWeave Sandboxes as an option.
Switching takes one line of code.

To test an AI agent, you run it in a sandbox: a throwaway cloud machine where it does the real work.

items.text: New course on serving LLMs efficiently -- how do you serve models to many concurrent users at low latency and reasonable cost? items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: We evaluated five production agent stacks: Codex, Claude Code, Google Antigravity, ADK, and OpenCode, with and without customization and skill tuning. Even with the best enhancements, agents still struggle to escalate to humans at the right moment. State-of-the-art agents remain far from reliable human collaboration.
items.title: We evaluated five production agent stacks: Codex, Claude Code, Google Antigravity, ADK, and OpenCode…
items.whyItMatters: 实测5大Agent栈人机协作痛点，指导可靠Agent构建
items.summary: We evaluated five production agent stacks: Codex, Claude Code, Google Antigravity, ADK, and OpenCode, with and without customization and skill tuning. Even with the best enhancements, agents still struggle to escalate to humans at the right moment. State-of-the-art agents remain far from reliable human collaboration.

items.author: @ScaleAILabs
items.text: Not all agents fail the same way. GPT-based agents tend to ask early. Claude-based agents tend to explore first. But when GPT runs inside Codex, a harness that discourages asking, that behavior nearly disappears. The harness shapes collaboration strategy as much as the model itself.
items.title: Not all agents fail the same way. GPT-based agents tend to ask early. Claude-based agents tend to ex…
items.whyItMatters: Harness对Agent行为影响巨大，实操参考
items.summary: Not all agents fail the same way. GPT-based agents tend to ask early. Claude-based agents tend to explore first. But when GPT runs inside Codex, a harness that discourages asking, that behavior nearly disappears. The harness shapes collaboration strategy as much as the model itself.

roundup.title: Agent Labs Go Recursive: Sakana RSI & Claude 80%
roundup.subtitle: Sakana成立RSI Lab，Anthropic Claude已写80%代码
headline: @SakanaAILabs 正式成立 RSI Lab，推出 Darwin Gödel Machine 等自改写代码的递归自改进 Agent，目标将软件工程性能翻倍。@arjunkocher 与 @alexalbert__ 同时披露 Anthropic 内部数据：Claude 已贡献超过 80% 合并代码，工程师产出提升 8 倍。
@UnslothAI 与 @danielhanchen 发布 Gemma 4 QAT 版本，26B-A4B 模型可在 16GB RAM 运行，精度损失极小。@vllm_project 同步宣布 Day-0 支持 NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B MoE 模型，最高 1M token 上下文。
@cursor_ai 上线 Design Mode，支持视觉提示直接修改 UI，显著缩小 Agent 与人类理解差距。@OpenRouter 同时开放实时缓存命中率与有效价格对比，助力多模型路由选型。
@MiniMax_AI 实测显示 M3 以 $0.07 成本在 17 个 bug 中捕获 13 个，与 Claude Opus 4.8 持平。@LangChain 则宣布 Google ADK Agent 可一键部署至 LangSmith 托管环境。

deepDives.title: Sakana AI 成立 RSI Lab
deepDives.summary: Sakana 推出递归自改进实验室，专注 Agent 自主重写自身代码库。

facts.text: Sakana 正式成立 RSI Lab，推出 Darwin Gödel Machine 等自改写代码的 Agent。
facts.quote: LLM², Darwin Gödel Machine: Agents autonomously rewriting their own codebase to double software-engineering performance

bullish.text: 自改进 Agent 时代真正到来

deepDives.title: Anthropic 内部 Claude 代码贡献超 80%
deepDives.summary: Anthropic 披露 Claude 已主导代码库合并，工程师效率大幅提升。

facts.text: 超过 80% 合并进 Anthropic 代码库的代码由 Claude 编写。
facts.quote: Over 80% of all code merged into our codebase is now written by Claude

facts.text: 典型 Anthropic 工程师现在能完成 8 倍工作量。
facts.quote: The typical Anthropic engineer ships 8x as much

bullets.text: MiniMax M3 以 $0.07 成本捕获 13/17 bugs，与 Claude Opus 4.8 持平。
bullets.quote: $0.07 for M3, $3.39 for Opus. Both caught 13 of 17 bugs

bullets.text: Gemma 4 QAT 使 26B-A4B 模型在 16GB RAM 运行，精度从 70.2% 提升至 85.6%。
Cursor Design Mode 支持视觉提示直接修改 UI。
bullets.quote: With Design Mode, you can now point, draw, or talk to update your UI

bullets.text: LangChain 支持 Google ADK Agent 一键部署至 LangSmith。
bullets.quote: You can now deploy Google ADK agents to LangSmith

bullets.text: vLLM 即刻支持 Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B MoE，最高 1M token 上下文。
bullets.quote: 550B total / 55B active — Hybrid Transformer-Mamba MoE, Up to 1M token context

bullets.text: turbopuffer 新增 branching 功能，440ms p50 完成命名空间克隆。

topTweets.whyItMatters: 大幅缩小 Agent 与人类理解差距

topTweets.author: @vllm_project
topTweets.text: Day-0 支持 Nemotron 3 Ultra 550B MoE
topTweets.whyItMatters: 开放前沿模型 serving 生态加速

topTweets.author: @MiniMax_AI
topTweets.text: M3 以 $0.07 成本完成代码审计
topTweets.whyItMatters: 成本优势明显，影响模型选型

takeaways: 多模型路由与缓存命中率监控已成为 Agent 成本优化的核心工程实践。
视觉提示与 Design Mode 正在快速缩小 Agent 与 UI 迭代的理解鸿沟。
Gemma 4 QAT 与 Nemotron 3 Ultra 的开源落地，显著降低本地长上下文 Agent 部署门槛。
递归自改进实验室（RSI Lab）成立，标志 Agent 能力进入自我加速阶段。
Anthropic 内部 80% 代码由 Claude 生成，提示代码审查与安全检查清单需求激增。
